notes: Iter 15: BENCHMARK — 100% TQQQ at all times, no protections. Forces every regime panel (R1/R2 base/upside/protection) to QQQ=0 + XLU=0, leaving TQQQ as the only weight. dd_t1 pinned at 50% so R1 covers any normal-conditions drawdown; R2 only triggers on extreme crashes (which makes no difference since R2 is also 100% TQQQ). All rebalance flags = match. Hypothesis: this exposes the absolute CAGR ceiling (with TQQQ leverage decay) and the absolute DD floor (worst possible drawdown) — provides reference points to compare regime-strategy iterations against.
